goalText: Hunt 15 Deer with Tiger strikes before moves run out
note: Rules per KING_OF_JUNGLE_DESIGN_RULES.md — Zone I Starter Plains. Grid always 6x6, Zone I animals only, no blockers at Level 1.
tutorialHint: Match Tigers beside Deer. Deer-only matches scatter, but they do not count as hunts.
difficultyNote: Level 1 keeps the required 30 moves and 6x6 Zone I board, but only Tiger food-chain attacks count toward the Deer objective so the level cannot auto-clear from random Deer matches.
animationRequirements: Level start jungle-gate opening with Rule the Jungle title
Tiger pounce trails when predator matches hunt adjacent Deer or Goat
Fierce Tiger glow, claw-slash screen flash, and board shake for 5-in-row color sweep
Line-rush/cross-strike and expanding blast visual feedback for special matches
Prey-hit dissolve, floating score, jungle particles, cascade drop-in, and new-spawn animations
Victory crown and defeated Tiger state overlays

audioDesign.copyrightSafe: All Level 1 BGM and SFX are generated in code with Web Audio oscillators/noise; no external copyrighted audio files are required.
ambientBgm: procedural cricket, bird, and leaf noise
audioDesign.comboIntensity: large matches temporarily increase procedural drum density and low-end impact
audioDesign.spatialization: SFX pan left/right based on the triggering board column
sfx: Tiger roar with bass drop for 5-in-row Fierce Tiger
swoosh and claw slash for color-bomb trigger
low rumble and boom for 2x2 blast
crunch/pop for successful hunts and tile clears
victory arpeggio and drum hit for success
